reviews.comment: Need to work on the coffee taste and ice tea was horrible. Funny thing that team members are so many that they only very noisy.. no training of staff too much panic on floor and team is not able to manage anything… very bad experience

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet expectations. We take your concerns about the coffee, iced tea, and overall service very seriously.

Creating a welcoming environment with thoughtfully crafted coffee is at the heart of what we do, and it’s clear we fell short during your visit. We’re actively working on enhancing team training and floor coordination to make sure every guest feels cared for and comfortable.

We hope you’ll consider giving us another try we’d love the chance to make it right and offer you the experience Coffee Island is known for, please DM us your contact details on Instragram at @coffee.island.in OR email us hello@coffeeisland.com.
